objective: On branch codex/superneo-formal-verification, execute all remaining highest-standard Lean formal verification work for Hegemon: close parser-internal/raw-byte refinement, complete native-node ingress-to-publication refinement across parser/storage/reorg/startup/sync/accepted-state paths, mechanize deployed proof/AIR-to-Hegemon statement refinement while keeping primitive crypto as named assumptions, keep positive bridge minting fail-closed until a PQ-clean verifier and external-chain soundness story are production-bound, add fail-closed DA/storage/global-privacy/release/dependency/performance gates and monitoring, maintain checked-in theorem matrix and living ExecPlans with completion percentage, run formal-core/targeted Rust gates, and validate runtime-impacting milestones on native-devnet-host before push.
measurement_method: Recompute the weighted average of config/highest-standard-formal-verification-matrix.json property completion percentages. The active-goal percent is valid only if the measured goal status is paused, every required property id and weight matches the fixed highest-standard theorem set, completed properties have no missing_work or remaining_work, completed properties list current evidence and explicit external assumptions, the matrix overall percent equals the recomputed weighted percent, and this ledger matches both. Mechanized assumption closure is recomputed separately against the checker's fixed track and closed-theorem policy; the public active-goal command also requires every credited theorem in the formal security claims set and runs aggregate Hegemon elaboration plus the axiom audit before emitting a passing result.
external_assumption_boundary: 100% here means complete under the checked matrix method with explicit named cryptographic assumptions, explicit proof-system assumptions, and explicit fail-closed system-model assumptions. It is not a claim of assumption-free primitive crypto, deployed proof-system soundness, DA retention, storage hardware semantics, external bridge soundness, global traffic-analysis privacy, scanner completeness, or live release-infrastructure honesty.
